Analysiert die Bewegung in der Serie und: Analyses the motion across the series and suggests the matching effect
Astro: viele Aufnahmen desselben Himmels: Astro: many frames of the same sky area → average out noise. Recommended: 20–100+ lights (more = less noise) · darks 15–30 · flats 15–30 · bias 30+. Optionally give a folder/file.
Aus einer Serie eine Langzeitbelichtung: A long exposure from a burst, no ND filter: silky water, light trails, remove movers.  Recommended: 10–30 (water) up to 300+ (light trails).
Bitte zuerst einen Eingabe-Ordner mit de: Please choose an input folder with the series first.
Ein extern bearbeitetes Bild zurück in S: Load an externally edited image back into StackForge (for preview/edit/export).
Empfohlen: Glatt 10–30 · Lichtspuren 30–: Recommended: Smooth 10–30 · Light trails 30–300+ (gap-free) · Declutter 8–20 · Brighten 10–60. Tripod, identical exposure.
GraXpert: Hintergrund/Gradient (Lichtver: GraXpert: remove background/gradient (light pollution). Installed = one click + automatic re-import; otherwise reveal the result in the file manager.
Hybrid: Mosaik = überlappende Kacheln (M: Hybrid: Mosaic = stitch overlapping tiles (Moon/Sun), ~30% overlap, 4–20+ tiles. Focus+Astro = several shots (5–15) per focus position in a subfolder, multiple positions.
Makro/Fokus: mehrere Nahaufnahmen mit Fo: Macro/focus: several close-ups focusing front to back → one fully sharp image. Recommended: 10–40 frames (enough to cover everything sharp), tripod, identical exposure.
Mehrere Nahaufnahmen → ein durchgehend s: Several close-ups → one fully sharp image. Products, coins, insects, food.  Recommended: 10–40 frames.
Mond-/Sonnen-Mosaik aus Kacheln — oder F: Moon/Sun mosaic from tiles — or Focus+Astro (denoise first, then focus-stack).  Mosaic 4–20+ tiles · Focus+Astro 5–15 shots per position.
Sprache, KI-Server und weitere Einstellu: Language, AI server and more settings
StarNet++: remove stars (starless). Installed = one click + automatic re-import; otherwise reveal the result in the file manager.
Sternenhimmel/Deep-Sky: kalibrieren, aus: Starry sky/deep-sky: calibrate, align, average noise, drop bad subs.  Recommended: 20–100+ lights (+ darks/flats).
Tipp: Im Anfänger-Modus genügt „Ordner w: Tip: in Beginner mode just "choose a folder" — the automatic explains its decisions.
Was möchtest du stacken? Modul wählen —: What would you like to stack? Pick a module — switch any time via "◀ Modules".
Zeigt das 32-bit-lineare Ergebnis im Dat: Reveals the 32-bit linear result in the file manager — for PixInsight or other tools.
⚡ Loslegen — Ordner wählen, dann Automa: ⚡  Start — pick a folder, then Automatic
